top_signals.title: Silver X acquires full ownership of Peru gold project from Barrick
top_signals.summary: In return, Barrick will receive $30,000 in cash consideration, plus a net smelter return royalty with a partial buyback provision.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Vibe-coding phenomenon lifts AI startup Supabase to $10.5 billion valuation
top_signals.summary: Database startup Supabase announced a $500 million funding round that values the company at $10.5 billion, including the fresh capital.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: KSM shows how difficult it is to build a mine in Canada
top_signals.summary: In BC especially, miners can still find large deposits despite a global slowdown but they struggle to move them through.

top_signals.title: Supreme Court rules FCC fines punishing telecom giants for sharing location data were legal
top_signals.summary: The Trump administration had backed the FCC’s position and, apart from Justice Clarence Thomas, the high court agreed.
